label: NCBI Taxonomy (Biology)
description:
Taxonomic hierarchy for vertebrates, vascular plants, fungi, and major invertebrate/bacterial groups. Sourced from the NCBI Taxonomy database. Ranks from kingdom to species for vertebrates; kingdom to genus for plants/fungi; kingdom to order for invertebrates.

Atom IDs: bio:{rank}:{scientific_name}, e.g. bio:species:homo_sapiens, bio:family:felidae
license: Public domain (National Center for Biotechnology Information)
attribution: NCBI Taxonomy, National Center for Biotechnology Information
